mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (registration_id, athlete_id, event_id, `rank`, `result`, points) VALUES (#{registrationId}, #{athleteId}, #{eventId}, #{rank}, #{result}, #{points})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, a.name AS athlete_name, a.student_no AS athlete_student_no, d.name AS dept_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN athlete a ON s.athlete_id = a.id LEFT JOIN department d ON a.dept_id = d.id WHERE s.event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY s.`rank`
SELECT s.*, e.name AS event_name, e.category AS event_category FROM score s LEFT JOIN event e ON s.event_id = e.id WHERE s.athlete_id = #{athleteId} ORDER BY e.event_date, e.event_time

SELECT d.name AS deptName, d.id AS deptId, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.category = '男子' THEN s.points ELSE 0 END), 0) AS maleScore, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.category = '女子' THEN s.points ELSE 0 END), 0) AS femaleScore, COALESCE(SUM(s.points), 0) AS totalScore, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.`rank` = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS goldCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.`rank` = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS silverCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.`rank` = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS bronzeCount FROM score s LEFT JOIN athlete a ON s.athlete_id = a.id LEFT JOIN department d ON a.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN event e ON s.event_id = e.id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY totalScore DESC

SELECT s.*, a.name AS athlete_name, a.student_no AS athlete_student_no, d.name AS dept_name, e.name AS event_name, e.category AS event_category, e.event_date AS eventDate FROM score s LEFT JOIN athlete a ON s.athlete_id = a.id LEFT JOIN department d ON a.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN event e ON s.event_id = e.id WHERE a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY e.event_date, e.event_time
